message:
test(registry): add manifest parser + normalization unit tests (bd-2n73.17)

39 tests covering Zod schema edge cases, tool categorization logic
(required/recommended/optional), phase grouping, category filtering,
fallback registry shape, and golden fixture normalization. Documents
that parseManifest strips robotMode/mcp during normalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
